# freetokencounter.app

> Free AI token counter for 100+ models across 12 providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, xAI, Mistral, DeepSeek, Cohere, Alibaba/Qwen, Moonshot, Perplexity, MiniMax). Counts run entirely in the browser with calibrated estimates honest about ±5% accuracy on English text. Live cost estimates, context-window meter, token visualization, no sign-up.

## Key facts

- URL: https://freetokencounter.app/
- Cost: free, no sign-up, no API key required
- Privacy: 100% client-side — no prompt data leaves the browser
- Models supported (119 total):
  - OpenAI: GPT-5.4, GPT-5.4 mini, GPT-5.4 nano, GPT-5.4 Pro, GPT-5.3 Codex, GPT-5.3 Chat, GPT-5.2, GPT-5.2 Pro, GPT-5.2 Codex, GPT-5.2 Chat, GPT-5.1, GPT-5.1 Codex, GPT-5.1 Codex Mini, GPT-5.1 Codex Max, GPT-5.1 Chat, GPT-5, GPT-5 Pro, GPT-5 mini, GPT-5 nano, GPT-5 Codex, GPT-5 Chat, o4-mini, o4-mini Deep Research, o3, o3-pro, o3-mini, o3 Deep Research, o1, o1-pro, o1-mini, GPT-4.1, GPT-4.1 mini, GPT-4.1 nano, GPT-4o, ChatGPT-4o, GPT-4o mini, GPT-4 Turbo, GPT-4, GPT-3.5 Turbo
  - Anthropic: Claude Opus 4.7, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku 4.5, Sonnet 4.5, Opus 4.1, Opus 4, Sonnet 4, 3.7 Sonnet, 3.5 Sonnet, 3.5 Haiku, 3 Opus, 3 Haiku
  - Google: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview, 3.1 Flash-Lite Preview, 3.1 Flash Live Preview, 3 Flash Preview, 2.5 Pro, 2.5 Flash, 2.5 Flash-Lite, 2.5 Flash Native Audio, 2.0 Flash, 2.0 Flash-Lite, 1.5 Pro, 1.5 Flash, 1.5 Flash-8B
  - Meta: Llama 4 Maverick, Llama 4 Scout, Llama 4 Behemoth, Llama 3.3 70B, Llama 3.1 405B/70B/8B, Llama 3 70B/8B
  - xAI: Grok 4, Grok 4 Heavy, Grok 4 Fast, Grok Code Fast 1, Grok 3, Grok 3 Mini, Grok 2
  - Mistral: Mistral Large 2, Medium 3, Small 3.1, Magistral Medium, Magistral Small, Pixtral Large, Codestral 25.01, Nemo, Mixtral 8x7B, Codestral
  - DeepSeek: V3.1, V3, R1, R1 Distill 70B, Coder V2
  - Cohere: Command A, Command R+, Command R, Command R7B, Aya Expanse 32B
  - Alibaba (Qwen): Qwen3-Max, Qwen3-235B, Qwen3-Coder, Qwen3-30B-A3B, Qwen2.5-Max, Qwen2.5-72B, QwQ-32B
  - Moonshot: Kimi K2, Kimi K2 Thinking, Moonshot v1 128K, Moonshot v1 32K
  - Perplexity: Sonar, Sonar Pro, Sonar Reasoning, Sonar Reasoning Pro, Sonar Deep Research
  - MiniMax: MiniMax-M1, MiniMax-Text-01, abab6.5
- Method: public GPT-2 / cl100k splitting pattern + per-model calibration constants
- Accuracy: within ~3% on OpenAI/Llama models, ~5–8% on Claude/Gemini/MiniMax (calibrated estimates, transparently labeled)
- Open source category: developer / utility

## Features

- Live token counter that updates as you type (debounced 80ms)
- Token visualization with cycling pastel highlights — see exactly how the model splits your text
- Context-window meter: progress bar against the selected model's limit
- Per-model cost estimate (input + output) using official rate cards
- Editable expected-output-token field
- Search across 30+ models, grouped by provider
- Character, word, byte stats
- Copy count, copy token IDs JSON, download JSON, copy all stats
- Dark mode (shared `suite_theme` localStorage with all Freesuite tools)
- PWA with offline service-worker cache
- All counts honestly labeled as "Estimate" — no false claims of byte-exact counts for closed tokenizers

## Page index

- [/](https://freetokencounter.app/) — Main token counter app + comparison table + FAQ
- [/vs-openai-tokenizer](https://freetokencounter.app/vs-openai-tokenizer) — Honest comparison vs OpenAI's tokenizer playground (multi-model alternative)
- [/gpt-4o-token-counter](https://freetokencounter.app/gpt-4o-token-counter) — GPT-4o-specific guide and counter
- [/claude-token-counter](https://freetokencounter.app/claude-token-counter) — Claude 3 / 3.5 family with accuracy disclaimer
- [/how-to-count-tokens-for-llms](https://freetokencounter.app/how-to-count-tokens-for-llms) — Educational explainer on tokenization, BPE, and context windows
- [/llm-prompt-cost-calculator](https://freetokencounter.app/llm-prompt-cost-calculator) — Cost-focused page with full pricing comparison and optimization strategies

## Related Freesuite tools

- [freewordcounter.app](https://freewordcounter.app) — Word, character, sentence counter
- [freejsonformatter.app](https://freejsonformatter.app) — Format and validate JSON
- [freecsv2json.app](https://freecsv2json.app) — Convert CSV ↔ JSON in browser
- [freebase64.app](https://freebase64.app) — Base64 encoder/decoder
- [freecaseconverter.app](https://freecaseconverter.app) — Text case conversion
- [freeloremipsum.app](https://freeloremipsum.app) — Lorem Ipsum generator
